/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING BEFORE JUDGE MURPHY/DEFT WV CPX/WITEXCL: DEFENSE/X: SUBPOENAED RECORDS RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE,/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD OFF ARISMITH-RUSSACK, SFPD OFF KATHRYN WINTERS, SFPD SGT ROBERT TRUJILLO, SFPD OFF CORY FOSS, & SFPD OFF ISIAS CUBAS/EXHMA: PEO'S 1) 1-PAGE DOCUMENT (AERIAL STREET MAP), PEO'S 2) 1-PAGE DOCUMENT (PHOTO OF  CELLPHONE IMAGE OF MAN WITH TWO CHILDREN), PEO'S 3) 1-PAGE DOCUMENT (PHOTO OF INTERSECTION), PEO'S4) 1-PAGE DOCUMENT (PHOTO OF VEHICLELICENSE PLATE), PEO'S 5) USB DRIVE (CONTAINING VIDEO SURVEILLANCE FOOTAGE),PEO'S 6) 2-PAGE DOCUMENT (PROP 115 QUESTIONNAIRE FORM), PEO'S 7) 3-PAGE DOCUMENT (SERIES OF THREE PHOTOS; EACH DEPICTING A VAN), PEO'S 8) 1-PAGE DOCUMENT (CERTIFIED COPY OF SFPD MUGSHOT)/EXHMA: DEF'S A) THUMB DRIVE (CONTAINING VIDEO 1), DEF'S B) MULTI-PAGE DOCUMENT (CERTIFIED COPY OF C,A,D, EVENT HISTORY DETAIL; 11-25-21), DEF'S C) MULTI-PAGE DOCUMENT (CERTIFIED COPY OF C,A,D, EVENT HISTORY DETAIL; 11-25-21)//ARG&SUB/X:  THE DEFENSE'S ORAL PC 17(B) MOTION TO REDUCE CHARGE(S) TO MISDEMEANOR(S) IS DENIED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSWILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/HTA1: 1, 3, & 4 /871D: 2 & 5/CTORD: ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION IN DEPT 22 ON 03-30-2022/DOP/S22/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/NP/X: JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN PRESIDING,/TRANS 13: FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/LDPX: 03-16-22 (10), 05-02-22 (60)/TE: 90 MINUTES/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ /X: DEFENDANT'S CASE MANAGER, MR, KNUCKLES, & DEFENDANT'S FIANCEE, MERCEDESCROSS, APPEAR VIA ZOOM/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED/CONT/DOP/LDPX: 03-16-22(10) 05-02-22(60)/

/CAL: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X: DEFENDANT'S FIANCEE, MERCEDES CROSS, APPEARS BY ZOOM/X: DEFENDANT'S CASE MANAGER FROM ARRIBA JUNTOS, ALANKNUCKLES, APPEARS IN COURT/ARG&SUB/GRTD/X: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: FUTURE COURT DATE OF 03-15-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-16-22 (10), 05-02-22 (60)/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD//SA1: JAYONCE J,, FEMALE 10 YEARS OLD/SA1: JALANDO S,, MALE 8 YEARS OLD/SA1: JAMIYA J,, FEMALE, 13 YEARS OLD/JAYON J,, MALE, 10 YEARS OLD/SA1: DEMARCUS G,, MALE, 14 YEARS OLD/SAORD3/CTORD: THE PROTECTED PERSON MAY RECORD ANYPROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY THE RESTRAINED PERSON/CONTD: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 90 MINUTES/
